calendar.matters:
HEARING ON RAGHDA ALGAZALY'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF THE MINOR, IBRAHEM ALJABOURI
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name of Minor Ibrahem Aljabouri by Petitioner Raghda Algazaly.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Matter not Reported

Petitioner Raghda Algazaly appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.
Father of Minor Ibrahem Ibrahem appeared in court.

The court hears from both parents regarding the request for a minor name change and reads the opposition filed by the Father Ibrahem Ibrahem.

The court DENIES the request to change the name of the minor and refers the Petitioner to the ACCESS Center for help filing a family law parentage matter.

HEARING ON RAGHDA ALGAZALY'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF THE MINOR, IBRAHEM ALJABOURI
Off Calendar Mar-19-2026 Continued To Apr-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
